news_items.headline: Tyrone Taylor's clutch three-run homer, Carson Benge's walk-off give Mets dramatic win over Yankees
news_items.summary: The Mets defeated the Yankees in dramatic fashion, coming back from four runs down to walk off with a 7-6 win in extra innings.

news_items.headline: Cardinals Bats Go Quiet-Kansas City Royals Shutout St. Louis 2-0
news_items.summary: Quiet Sundays can be a good thing, but not when it describes what happened to the St. Louis Cardinals bats as the Royals avoided a sweep winning 2-0. Andre Pallante was not the Cardinals problem Sunday as he gave them 6 2/3 innings allowing 8 hits, 1 earned run striking out 7 with no walks. […]
